description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of sandals is one reason why we love the summer! catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Product DetailsThong style straps with the ends connected to an elasticated ankle loopSoft brown footbed with a heel patchTPU outsole with an oval lug at the heelMaterial and Care SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
